title: Power App Developer
description:
We’re hiring a Power App/Platform Developer to join our team, focused on automation, rapid prototyping, and internal product development. This role is for someone who can take a rough idea, turn it into a working solution quickly, and iterate with stakeholders to deliver real business value.

You’ll build Power Apps, Power Automate workflows, and Power BI dashboards, often integrating with systems like SharePoint, Microsoft 365, Dataverse, SQL, and APIs. You’ll also help shape how automation is designed, scaled, governed, and supported across the organization.

What You’ll Do

  • Build and ship Power Apps (Canvas + ideally Model-driven) for internal workflows and tools
  • Create scalable Power Automate flows (approvals, orchestration, notifications, integrations, error handling)
  • Design Power BI reports that drive decisions, not just “pretty visuals”
  • Prototype new automation ideas quickly and refine based on feedback
  • Integrate with SharePoint, Teams, Excel, SQL, Dataverse, and APIs
  • Implement security, governance, environments, and solution packaging (ALM basics)
  • Document solutions so other developers/support teams can maintain them
  • Identify automation opportunities and recommend the highest ROI use cases

What We’re Looking For (must-have)

  • Hands-on experience delivering solutions using:
  • Power Apps
  • Power Automate
  • Power BI
  • Strong ability to turn vague requests into structured requirements
  • Comfortable working with stakeholders who don’t know what they want yet
  • Solid understanding of:
  • connectors, triggers, conditions, loops, data shaping
  • debugging, monitoring, failure handling, performance
  • Data skills: ability to work with relational-ish thinking (Dataverse/SQL concepts)
  • Strong communication + ownership mindset (you ship, you don’t just “try”)

How We Work

  • Fast iteration, short feedback loops
  • Prototype early → validate quickly → scale what works
  • Expectation: you deliver working software, not slide decks

Example Projects You Might Build (Power Platform)

  • Internal Service / Ticket System (Power Apps + Dataverse/SharePoint + Power Automate)

Intake → prioritization → assignment → SLA tracking → status updates → Teams notifications → reporting

  • Voting / Intake Platform (Power Apps + Power Automate + Power BI)

Users submit ideas → teams vote/comment → auto-rank based on scoring → approval workflows → dashboard visibility

  • Email / Spreadsheet Replacement Tools

Converting recurring “Excel chaos + email threads” into structured apps with governance + reporting

Job Types: Full-time, Part-time, Permanent, Contract, Internship

Contract length: 12 months

Benefits:

  • Additional leave
  • Flexible schedule
  • Professional development
  • Promotion to permanent employee
  • Work from home

Work Location: Hybrid remote
